description_long: This is a modern square table with a flat, dark-colored tabletop and a single central pedestal base. The pedestal extends downward and branches out into four evenly spaced legs that form an X-shaped support structure, providing stability. The tabletop appears to be made of a solid, durable material, likely metal or composite, with a matte finish. The legs and pedestal are also constructed from a sturdy material, possibly powder-coated steel, giving the table a robust and industrial look. There are no visible decorative elements or attached seating, emphasizing a minimalist and functional design. This table is suitable for urban environments such as outdoor cafes, public parks, or sidewalk seating areas.
description: A modern square table with a dark, flat top and a central pedestal branching into four sturdy legs, featuring a minimalist, industrial design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the square tabletop and the X-shaped leg base directly beneath the center.
description_view_1: Side view with the tabletop and pedestal base visible, highlighting the symmetry of the leg supports.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, showing the square top and central support structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side, with the tabletop and X-shaped base clearly visible.
attribute_number_of_legs: single central pedestal with four branching feet
